pressEnterToFinishLine: ▸ Press Enter to show full text

screen0.p2: In this city, cooking at home is a crime against high society. Your worth is measured by where you eat, who you eat with, and who you are seen ignoring.
screen0.p3: At the center of it all is LE SOLSTICE. The most exclusive, impossible-to-book restaurant in the world.
screen0.p4: Last night, the Maître D' seated a Duke next to the kitchen doors. He has not been seen since.
screen0.p5: Today, they are interviewing his replacement.

screen1.monsieurV: Ah. The new applicant. You look entirely unqualified. Perfect. Fill out the paperwork before I change my mind.

screen2.p1: {{name}}. Look at me. That door isn't charm—it's what keeps this room from the street. You hold it, or we all pay for it.
screen2.p2: Past the glass you've got teeth everywhere—politicians, influencers, Syndicate. They want in; they don't care about our house rules. I do. You're the one who makes them stick.
screen2.p3: Wave the wrong person through and we're a punchline. Snub the wrong name and we're sweeping up glass. Keep the stars, keep the till honest, and for God's sake don't let anyone humiliate me at that podium.

screen3.monsieurV: They're already out there, waiting. Open the doors—for me. I need you on that floor. Please don't waste my trust.

mrVDialogueInGame.aria: Monsieur V. — press Enter or click to continue
